description_long: This object is a compact, double-barreled shotgun with a dark metallic finish on the barrels and a wooden grip and fore-end. The barrels are arranged side-by-side, and the overall length is short, making it a sawed-off style. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses two triggers, indicating the ability to fire each barrel independently. The wooden grip is smoothly contoured and polished, contrasting with the matte black metal of the barrels. The break-action hinge and locking mechanism are visible beneath the barrels, and there is no visible stock, giving it a pistol-grip profile.
description: A short, side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a dark metal finish and a polished wooden pistol grip, featuring a rounded trigger guard and no stock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin barrels side-by-side and the rounded wooden grip below.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the barrels, the break-action hinge, and the smooth wooden grip.
description_view_2: Muzzle view highlighting the two parallel barrels and the dark metallic finish.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the trigger guard, dual triggers, and the contoured wooden grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard enclosing two triggers, no finger grooves or reinforcement visible
